question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: What is the gender of Agent 13 hero? Agent 13 hero refers to superhero_name = 'Agent 13';

orig_gold_sql: SELECT T2.gender FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN gender AS T2 ON T1.gender_id = T2.id WHERE T1.superhero_name = 'Agent 13'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: What is the height of the tallest player? Indicate his name. tallest player refers to MAX(height);

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: What is the name of players with the highest potential? highest potential refers to MAX(potential)

orig_gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t1.player_name FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id ORDER BY t2.potential DESC LIMIT 1

question: <QUESTION>

orig_evidence: born after 1990 refers to strftime('%Y', birthday) = '1990';

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: How many accounts who have region in Prague are eligible for loans?  A3 contains the data of region
orig_masked: How many [T1] who have [T5] in [V1] are eligible for [T6]?  [C25] contains the data of [T5]; [V1] is a value of the column [C25]
orig_evidence: A3 contains the data of region
orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.account_id) FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN district AS T3 ON T1.district_id = T3.district_id WHERE T3.A3 = 'Prague'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Count the good female superheroes.  good refers to alignment.id = 1; female refers to gender.id = 2;
orig_masked: Count the [C1] [C7] [T9].  [C1] refers to [C2] = [V1]; [C7] refers to [C8] = [V2];; [V1] is a value of the column [C2]; [V2] is a value of the column [C8]
orig_evidence: good refers to alignment.id = 1; female refers to gender.id = 2;
orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN alignment AS T2 ON T1.alignment_id = T2.id INNER JOIN gender AS T3 ON T1.gender_id = T3.id WHERE T2.alignment = 'Good' AND T3.gender = 'Female'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: What is the amount of debt that client number 992 has, and how is this client doing with payments?
orig_masked: What is the [C34] of [T6] that [C10] [V1] has, and how is this [T3] doing with [C39]?  ; [V1] is a value of the column [C10]
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T4.amount, T4.status FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id INNER JOIN account AS T3 on T2.account_id = T3.account_id INNER JOIN loan AS T4 ON T3.account_id = T4.account_id WHERE T1.client_id = 992

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Give the alignment and superpowers of the superhero named Atom IV. superpowers refers to power_name;
orig_masked: Give the [C1] and [T10] of the [T9] [C28] [V1]. [T10] refers to [C31];; [V1] is a value of the column [C28]
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T4.alignment, T3.power_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T3.id = T2.power_id INNER JOIN alignment AS T4 ON T1.alignment_id = T4.id WHERE T1.superhero_name = 'Atom IV'
